headlines.title: 'Anybody can apply': Blanche pressed over who can get compensation from DOJ fund
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche was pressed during his testimony at a Senate Appropriations Subcommittee hearing over who could be compensated from the Justice Department’s anti-weaponization fund. Sen. Chris Coons, D-Del., questioned Blanche whether President Donald Trump’s campaign donors or those who assaulted law enforcement during the January 6 riots could receive compensation.

headlines.title: American Doctor Infected With Ebola While Working in Congo
headlines.description: The CDC confirms an American doctor has tested positive for the deadly Ebola virus while working in the Democratic Republic of Congo. This comes as entry into the United States is being restricted for some travelers in response to the outbreak. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Teen Gunmen Open Fire in San Diego Mosque, Killing 3
headlines.description: Two teenaged gunmen opened fire at the Islamic Center of San Diego, killing three adults. Soon after, a vehicle was found with the bodies of both the alleged shooters inside. San Diego police tell NBC News that the mother of the 17-year-old suspect called police hours earlier, sharing she believed her son was suicidal, was wearing camouflage, left behind a note and that both her car and several firearms were missing. NBC’s Morgan Chesky reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump Targets Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie in Tuesday Primary
headlines.description: Voters are heading to the polls for primaries across six states, including Kentucky, where the campaign of Rep. Thomas Massie, a repeated Trump critic, is being seen as a crucial test of President Donald Trump’s power on the Republican party. Meanwhile, the Justice Department set up what it calls an “anti-weaponization fund,” using nearly $1.8 billion of taxpayer money to pay Trump allies who say they were unfairly prosecuted by the Biden administration. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and

headlines.title: Are consumers cracking under the weight of high prices? We’re about to find out
headlines.description: Home Depot, Lowe’s, Walmart and Target report earnings this week, offering a clear picture of how consumers are faring amid inflation and high energy costs.

headlines.title: Goodbye Trump, hello Putin: China’s Xi welcomes Russian leader facing pressure at home
headlines.description: Vladimir Putin landed in China on Tuesday to a warm welcome from his “dear friend” President Xi Jinping, but he arrived with the heavy burden of a war he increasingly seems unable to win.

headlines.title: Trump says he called off a planned attack on Iran
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he is calling off an attack on Iran planned for Tuesday because regional leaders had urged him to allow negotiations to continue and a “very acceptable” deal for the U.S. was at hand.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: ‘Star Wars’ and ‘Powerpuff Girls’ voice actor Tom Kane dies at 64
headlines.description: Tom Kane, who voiced characters in the “Star Wars” franchise and Professor Utonium in Cartoon Network’s “The Powerpuff Girls,” died Monday from complications of a stroke he suffered in 2020

headlines.title: Progressives seek another big primary win in the nation’s bluest House district
headlines.description: Progressives are cautiously optimistic that they can capture the nomination for a congressional seat in Philadelphia in a race against the Democratic Party’s center-left establishment Tuesday

headlines.title: Goodbye Trump, hello Putin: China’s Xi welcomes Russian leader facing pressure at home
headlines.description: Vladimir Putin landed in China on Tuesday to a warm welcome from his “dear friend” President Xi Jinping, but he arrived with the heavy burden of a war he increasingly seems unable to win.

headlines.title: ‘Heroic’ security guard killed protecting children and staff in San Diego mosque shooting
headlines.description: More than $1.4 million has been raised for the family of Amin Abdullah, the security guard fatally shot Monday at a San Diego mosque while protecting the lives of more than a dozen children and staff at a school inside
